variants: Qasid Farouk is a dedicated professional in the field of design, currently employed at Nightgate Entertainment. He graduated from Quartzfire School of Design, where he honed his skills in artistry and creativity. Born in Fireglen Lookout, he has a passion for the intricacies of language, particularly Icelandic declensions. Beyond his work in entertainment, Qasid serves as a Steward of Rainwatchers Network, contributing to vital environmental initiatives in his community. His dual focus on design and civic service exemplifies his commitment to making a positive impact.
